cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 27% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.30% · BTC -0.54% · Gold -1.10% · Nasdaq100 -1.35%. 27% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.36%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.36%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -9.21%
cards.body: Leaders: INTU +5.68%, AVAV +4.94%, ADBE +3.51%, WDAY +3.51%, CRM +3.48%. Laggards: SMR -9.21%, SKHY -9.18%, OKLO -8.93%, MRVL -8.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.76% at $132.89
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
